positive: Minimalist line-art depiction of a majestic mountain range at sunrise. The mountains should be rendered with clean, stylized silhouettes and interconnected geometric elements, forming a continuous, modern pattern suitable for apparel. Incorporate subtle elements like wispy clouds and stylized alpine flora drawn in a continuous line style. Use a restricted color palette of deep indigo, muted slate grey, burnt orange, and cream white, emphasizing high contrast and graphic impact. The composition should be centrally balanced and highly scalable, suitable for repeating patterns.
